item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice to create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Classic Danish meatballs with white potatoes, red cabbage and brown gravy, topped with a parsley-cress mix. Served with fresh cucumber salad. (1+2+6+11+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Brazilian chicken asado with baked sweet potato, topped with Brazilian tomato-bean salsa. Served with creamy avocado. (13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Brazilian grilled cheese asado with baked sweet potato, topped with Brazilian tomato-bean salsa. Served with creamy avocado. (6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Beef brisket fricassée with new potatoes, asparagus, peas, carrots and fresh pea shoots. (6+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Braised celeriac with mushrooms, new potatoes, asparagus, peas, carrots and pea shoots. (6+10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Peri peri chicken thighs, marinated in grilled red pepper and chili and slow-baked. Served with sweet potatoes and a crisp cabbage slaw with fresh herbs and tang. (14+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Piri piri tempeh, marinated in grilled red pepper and chili. Served with sweet potatoes and a crisp cabbage slaw with fresh herbs and tang. (14+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Thai-fried white fish in a sweet-sour-spicy sauce (tamarind, sweet chili and chili), rice noodles tossed in thai basil sauce and topped with spring onion and fresh thai basil. Served with a crisp thai cucumber salad. (3+7+9+13+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Thai-fried crispy tofu in a sweet-sour-spicy sauce (tamarind, sweet chili and chili), rice noodles tossed in thai basil sauce and topped with spring onion and fresh thai basil. Served with thai cucumber salad with peanuts and coriander on the side. (7+9+13+15)
